subject: Re: how to import one tilt stack from SerialEM
body:
Hi, thanks for the quick reply.  I have done that.  I have tried to give 
the correct folder names on the next page that opens, but nothing appears 
in the list.

On Saturday, 21 November 2020 at 00:24:50 UTC+2 miki...@gmail.com wrote:

> Hi,
>
> Change the input format to *.tomostar and press import tilt series from 
> imod. 
>
> V
>
> On Fri, 20 Nov 2020, 23:09 Juha Huiskonen, <juha.hu...@gmail.com> wrote:
>
>> Hi, 
>>
>> I have an unaligned stack (MRC) and an MDOC file from SerialEM. How can I 
>> import them to Warp 1.0.9 for processing.  
>>
>> To clarify, I have one image per tilt and all of the images are in one 
>> MRC file. 
>>
>> Best wishes
>> Juha
>>
>> -- 
>> You received this message because you are subscribed to the Google Groups 
>> "Warp" group.
>> To unsubscribe from this group and stop receiving emails from it, send an 
>> email to warp-em+u...@googlegroups.com.
>> To view this discussion on the web visit 
>> https://groups.google.com/d/msgid/warp-em/1fb90696-6f0f-4c11-8d64-555d818e6241n%40googlegroups.com 
>> <https://groups.google.com/d/msgid/warp-em/1fb90696-6f0f-4c11-8d64-555d818e6241n%40googlegroups.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=footer>
>> .
>>
>
